---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "move_layer"
namespace: "Transform"
description: "Move a data matrix stored at the .layers or .X attributes in a MuData object to another layer."
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `move_layer`  
Namespace: `transform`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/transform/move_layer)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/transform/move_layer)

:::




## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name                   |Description                                                                                                                                           |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`              |Input h5mu file                                                                                                                                       |`file`, required, example: `"input.h5mu"`  |
|`--modality`           |Which modality from the input MuData file to process.                                                                                                 |`string`, default: `"rna"`                 |
|`--input_layer`        |Input layer to move to a new output location. If specified, will be used to select a key from .layers, otherwise .X is used.                          |`string`                                   |
|`--output`             |Output h5mu file.                                                                                                                                     |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |
|`--output_layer`       |Destination location for the layer. If not provided, .X will be used, Otherwise, will be the key for the .layers attribute in the output MuData file. |`string`                                   |
|`--output_compression` |Compression format to use for the output AnnData and/or Mudata H5 files. By default no compression is applied.                                        |`string`, example: `"gzip"`                |

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/transform/move_layer/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/transform/move_layer).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/transform/move_layer/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
